metadata.description: Command-line interface to create Twenty application

metadata.scriptContent: npx rimraf dist && npx vite build

commands: tsgo -p tsconfig.lib.json --declaration --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist --rootDir src --composite false && npx tsc-alias -p tsconfig.lib.json --outDir dist

NODE_ENV=test NODE_OPTIONS="--max-old-space-size=12288 --import tsx/esm" nx database:reset > reset-logs.log && NODE_ENV=test NODE_OPTIONS="--max-old-space-size=12288 --import tsx/esm" nx jest --config ./jest-integration.config.ts

options.command: curl -f -s http://localhost:3000/healthz > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo '✅ Server already running' || (echo '🚀 Server not running, starting...' && nohup nest start &)

git diff --name-only --diff-filter=d main | grep -E '{args.pattern}' | grep '^packages/twenty-server/' | xargs sh -c 'if [ $# -gt 0 ]; then npx eslint --config packages/twenty-server/eslint.config.mjs "$@"; fi' _

fix.command: git diff --name-only --diff-filter=d main | grep -E '{args.pattern}' | grep '^packages/twenty-server/' | xargs sh -c 'if [ $# -gt 0 ]; then npx eslint --config packages/twenty-server/eslint.config.mjs --fix "$@"; fi' _

commands: tsgo -p tsconfig.lib.json --declaration --emitDeclarationOnly --noEmit false --outDir dist --rootDir src && npx tsc-alias -p tsconfig.lib.json --outDir dist

metadata.description: Effortlessly sync Twenty with 3000+ apps. Automate tasks, boost productivity, and supercharge your customer relationships!

metadata.scriptContent: NODE_ENV=production VITE_DISABLE_TYPESCRIPT_CHECKER=true NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 npx vite build && sh ./scripts/inject-runtime-env.sh
NODE_ENV=production VITE_BUILD_SOURCEMAP=true VITE_DISABLE_TYPESCRIPT_CHECKER=true NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 npx vite build && sh ./scripts/inject-runtime-env.sh

fix.command: git diff --name-only --diff-filter=d main | grep -E '{args.pattern}' | grep '^packages/twenty-front/' | xargs sh -c 'if [ $# -gt 0 ]; then npx eslint --config packages/twenty-front/eslint.config.mjs --fix "$@"; fi' _

options.command: git diff --name-only --diff-filter=d main | grep -E '{args.pattern}' | grep '^packages/twenty-front/' | xargs sh -c 'if [ $# -gt 0 ]; then npx eslint --config packages/twenty-front/eslint.config.mjs "$@"; fi' _

metadata.description: Twenty documentation site powered by Mintlify

commands: npx rimraf dist && npx vite build -c vite.config.node.ts && npx vite build -c vite.config.browser.ts && npx vite build -c vite.config.sdk.ts
tsgo -p tsconfig.lib.json --declaration --emitDeclarationOnly --noEmit false --outDir dist --rootDir src && npx tsc-alias -p tsconfig.lib.json --outDir dist

options.command: npx rimraf dist && npx vite build -c vite.config.node.ts && npx vite build -c vite.config.browser.ts && npx vite build -c vite.config.sdk.ts && tsgo -p tsconfig.lib.json --declaration --emitDeclarationOnly --noEmit false --outDir dist --rootDir src && npx tsc-alias -p tsconfig.lib.json --outDir dist && npx vite build -c vite.config.node.ts --watch & npx vite build -c vite.config.browser.ts --watch & npx vite build -c vite.config.sdk.ts --watch
npx wait-on http://localhost:3000/healthz --timeout 600000 --interval 1000 --log && NODE_ENV=test npx vitest run --config ./vitest.e2e.config.ts

metadata.scriptContent: npx concurrently --kill-others 'npx nx run-many -t start -p twenty-server twenty-front' 'npx wait-on tcp:3000 && npx nx run twenty-server:worker'
